agi_daily.narrative: A busy 24 hours at the frontier. Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 launch is the day's defining event: a new tier above Opus with LMArena and SWE-bench Verified leads over GPT-5.4, and early Hacker News reports of materially longer autonomous runs. OpenAI answered with orchestration and caching improvements rather than a new model, while DeepMind's new agent-safety eval suite signals where measurement is heading: reliability over raw capability. Mistral's EU-hosted Large refresh keeps the sovereign-inference lane competitive. Net: capability moved visibly on coding and reasoning benchmarks, driven by one frontier release — this is fixture data and will be replaced by the agent's first real run.

movers.what: Claude Fable 5 tops LMArena text and SWE-bench Verified
